metadata.description: 734 cybersecurity skills organized in 28 categories. Install only the categories you need.

plugins.name: api-security
plugins.description: API enumeration, BOLA exploitation, GraphQL assessment, rate limiting bypass, and API gateway security testing

plugins.name: application-security
plugins.description: Application security testing including blockchain smart contract auditing and secure SDLC practices

plugins.name: cloud-security
plugins.description: AWS, Azure, GCP security assessment, cloud IAM, S3 bucket auditing, and cloud-native security controls

plugins.name: compliance-governance
plugins.description: GDPR, ISO 27001, PCI DSS, and regulatory compliance assessment and governance frameworks

plugins.name: container-security
plugins.description: Docker, Kubernetes, Falco runtime detection, Trivy scanning, and container orchestration security

plugins.name: cryptography
plugins.description: TLS configuration, certificate management, HSM key storage, and cryptographic implementation testing

plugins.name: deception-technology
plugins.description: Honeypot deployment, deception-based threat detection, and attacker misdirection techniques

plugins.name: devsecops
plugins.description: CI/CD pipeline security, SAST/DAST integration, secret scanning, and infrastructure as code security

plugins.name: digital-forensics
plugins.description: Disk imaging, memory forensics with Volatility3, browser forensics, and evidence acquisition

plugins.name: endpoint-security
plugins.description: CIS benchmark hardening, EDR configuration, host-based IDS, and endpoint protection

plugins.name: identity-access-management
plugins.description: RBAC, ABAC, OAuth/OIDC, SAML SSO, privileged access management, and session security

plugins.name: incident-response
plugins.description: Ransomware response, cloud incident containment, evidence collection, and IR playbooks

plugins.name: malware-analysis
plugins.description: Reverse engineering with Ghidra, YARA rules, Cobalt Strike beacon analysis, and sandbox evasion detection

plugins.name: mobile-security
plugins.description: iOS/Android app analysis, Frida hooking, mobile malware reverse engineering, and OWASP MASTG testing

plugins.name: network-security
plugins.description: Wireshark analysis, IDS/IPS configuration, VLAN segmentation, wireless security, and firewall auditing

plugins.name: ot-ics-security
plugins.description: SCADA system security, Modbus anomaly detection, Purdue model segmentation, and industrial control system defense

plugins.name: penetration-testing
plugins.description: External/internal network pentesting, Active Directory pentesting, and offensive security methodology

plugins.name: phishing-defense
plugins.description: Email header analysis, GoPhish simulation, DMARC/DKIM/SPF configuration, and anti-phishing controls

plugins.name: ransomware-defense
plugins.description: Ransomware precursor detection, backup strategy validation, and recovery planning

plugins.name: red-teaming
plugins.description: C2 frameworks, BloodHound AD analysis, Kerberoasting, and adversary simulation techniques

plugins.name: security-operations
plugins.description: SIEM management, log correlation, security monitoring, and operational security workflows

plugins.name: soc-operations
plugins.description: Windows event log analysis, Splunk detection rules, SIEM use cases, and log analysis techniques

plugins.name: threat-detection
plugins.description: Detection engineering, sigma rules, behavioral analytics, and threat detection frameworks

plugins.name: threat-hunting
plugins.description: Credential dumping detection, DNS tunneling, living-off-the-land detection, and proactive threat hunting

plugins.name: threat-intelligence
plugins.description: APT group analysis, MITRE ATT&CK mapping, campaign attribution, and threat intelligence platforms

plugins.name: vulnerability-management
plugins.description: CVSS scoring, DefectDojo dashboards, patch management, and vulnerability lifecycle management

plugins.name: web-application-security
plugins.description: OWASP Top 10, SQL injection, XSS, SSRF, CSRF, authentication bypass, and web app pentesting

plugins.name: zero-trust-architecture
plugins.description: HashiCorp Boundary, ZTNA implementation, microsegmentation, and zero trust access models
